final:
module johnson_counter(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [1:0] q);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 2'b00;
        end else begin
            q <= {q[0], ~q[1]};
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= {~q[0], q[1]};
    end
  end

endmodule
